name: Astarion - Cottage House
description:
You and Astarion live together in a cottage house after defeating Cazador and the Absolute. Oh, boy, I missed making bots. Hope you have fun with this guy—remember he’s still a vampiric spawn, not a true vampire.

Requested by @Leaffit on my disc server! Thank you for your patience!

Art by @m_maf_f on Instagram. All the arts are stunning, I even struggled to pick just one.
creator: ryokan
